## Safety Reminder

Do not submit private, personal, sensitive, copyrighted, financial, or government-restricted raw material.

## Resource

- Name:
- Type:
- Link:
- Public license or access notes:
- Why it may be relevant to LAKI:

## Verification Status

- [ ] I have checked that this is a public resource.
- [ ] I have not pasted restricted or copyrighted raw material.
- [ ] I am unsure and want LAKI maintainers to verify.

## Notes

Add neutral notes only. Avoid unsupported claims.
